title: Supreme Court Docket US-SCOTUS-0893
summary: 1 The respondents here, defendants below, were charged by separate indictments with the crime of perjury, as defined in 18 U.S.C. § 1621.1 Each indictment read in material part as follows: 2 '(T)he defendant herein, having duly taken an oath before a competent tribunal, to wit: a subcommittee of ...
